queries.sql: SELECT `p`.*, `c`.`category_name`, `sc`.`category_name` AS `subCategory_name`, `pl`.*, `b`.*, `pm`.`model`, GROUP_CONCAT(pm2.model) AS additional_models, `pmv`.`model_year` FROM `_product` `p` LEFT JOIN `_product_priceLevel` `pl` ON `pl`.`product_id`=`p`.`product_id` LEFT JOIN `_brand` `b` USING (`brand_id`) LEFT JOIN `_product_model` `pm` ON `pm`.`product_model_id`=`p`.`model_id` LEFT JOIN `_product_model` `pm2` ON `pm2`.`product_model_id` IN ( p.model2_id, p.model3_id) LEFT JOIN `_category` `c` USING (`category_id`) LEFT JOIN `_category` `sc` ON `sc`.`category_id` = `p`.`category_id` LEFT JOIN `_product_model_var` `pmv` ON `pmv`.`product_model_id` = `pm`.`product_model_id` WHERE `p`.`product_id` = 'assets' GROUP BY `p`.`product_id`

timelineData.name: Query
timelineData.query: SELECT `p`.*, `c`.`category_name`, `sc`.`category_name` AS `subCategory_name`, `pl`.*, `b`.*, `pm`.`model`, GROUP_CONCAT(pm2.model) AS additional_models, `pmv`.`model_year` FROM `_product` `p` LEFT JOIN `_product_priceLevel` `pl` ON `pl`.`product_id`=`p`.`product_id` LEFT JOIN `_brand` `b` USING (`brand_id`) LEFT JOIN `_product_model` `pm` ON `pm`.`product_model_id`=`p`.`model_id` LEFT JOIN `_product_model` `pm2` ON `pm2`.`product_model_id` IN ( p.model2_id, p.model3_id) LEFT JOIN `_category` `c` USING (`category_id`) LEFT JOIN `_category` `sc` ON `sc`.`category_id` = `p`.`category_id` LEFT JOIN `_product_model_var` `pmv` ON `pmv`.`product_model_id` = `pm`.`product_model_id` WHERE `p`.`product_id` = 'assets' GROUP BY `p`.`product_id`
